description: Case style: Analogue watch with muted gold, round case, diamante on the fixed bezel Dial style: White dial with metallic hour marks and hands Features: Branding at the 12 hour mark, screw to reset time Strap style: Champagne gold leather strap with texturing, has a tang clasp Water resistant up to 10 metres Warranty: 2 year international warrantyWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
